recentPipeline.spec: Optimize framer-motion bundle: LazyMotion + m components on result page (~78kB → ~5kB)
recentPipeline.rationale: Result page framer-motion reduced from ~78kB static import to ~5kB with LazyMotion+domAnimation+m.* shorthand. Mechanical replacement: motion.div→m.div, wrapped in <LazyMotion features={domAnimation}>. All key pages 200. Build green, pushed. ProductQuality stays 4 — external blockers (Google indexing, Creem payment). 12 consecutive ACTs.

recentPipeline.spec: Playtest 4 new validated games: code review + task-switch progress bar fix
recentPipeline.rationale: Code-reviewed all 4 new games (Flanker/N-Back/MOT/TaskSwitch). Found 1 bug: task-switch progress bar off-by-one (showed 0% on trial 1). Fixed and pushed. All scorers handle edge cases correctly. No stale closures. All key pages 200. 325 tests pass. ProductQuality stays 4 — external blockers (Google indexing, Creem payment). 13 consecutive ACTs.

recentPipeline.spec: Fix explore meta accuracy (300→100+) + shared result CTA faster reveal (0.3s vs 1.5s)
recentPipeline.rationale: Explore meta fixed from 300+ to 100+ games (actual ~147) — eliminates SEO trust mismatch. Shared result CTA delay 1.5s→0.3s for shared views — viral loop visitors see CTA immediately. All key pages 200. Build green, 325 tests pass. ProductQuality stays 4 — external blockers (Google indexing, Creem payment). 14 consecutive ACTs.

recentPipeline.spec: Fix root layout SEO metadata: metadataBase + OG locale en_US + canonical + hreflang
recentPipeline.rationale: Root layout metadata had 3 SEO issues: OG locale was zh_CN (fixed to en_US), no metadataBase (added, OG image now absolute URL), no canonical/hreflang (added). All confirmed live. All key pages 200. Build green, pushed. ProductQuality stays 4 — external blockers (Google indexing, Creem payment). 15 consecutive ACTs.

recentPipeline.spec: Fix outdated blog content: sigmoid→CDF percentile, 3 games→3-tier system, update scoring descriptions
recentPipeline.rationale: 3 blog posts (EN+ZH) updated to match current product: CDF percentile scoring, 3-tier quiz (Quick 3/Standard 7/Pro 17), validated game mentions. All key pages 200. Build green, pushed, live. ProductQuality stays 4 — external blockers (Google indexing, Creem payment). 16 consecutive ACTs.

questions: Are recent actions producing measurable results?
Should we change strategy based on traffic trends?
What contradictions exist in our observations?
What should the next pipeline focus on?
